languages.text: "Ты бы знал насколько мне на это все наплевать. Мне просто нужен не свихнувшийся генетор в свите, и раз ты сам не можешь разобраться со своим больным разумом, значит я отвезу тебя на Амсанкт силком и заставлю".

"If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."
languages.original_text: "Ты бы знал насколько мне на это все наплевать. Мне просто нужен не свихнувшийся генетор в свите, и раз ты сам не можешь разобраться со своим больным разумом, значит я отвезу тебя на Амсанкт силком и заставлю".

traits.locale_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own sick mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

"If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

"If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

"If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own sick mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

languages.text: «Ojalá entendiera lo poco que me importa todo esto. Solo necesito que el genetor de mi séquito esté en plena posesión de sus facultades mentales. Puesto que no es capaz de tratar su propia mente trastornada, lo llevaré a Amasanct por la fuerza y me ocuparé de que se haga».
languages.original_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

traits.locale_text: «Ojalá entendiera lo poco que me importa todo esto. Solo necesito que el genetor de mi séquito esté en plena posesión de sus facultades mentales. Puesto que no es capaz de tratar su propia mente trastornada, lo llevaré a Amasanct por la fuerza y me ocuparé de que se haga».

languages.text: “我根本不在乎这些，明白吗？我需要的只是一名心智健全的基因士。既然你修不好你那坏了的心智，那我就把你绑去阿姆桑克特，亲自监督它修好。”
languages.original_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

traits.locale_text: “我根本不在乎这些，明白吗？我需要的只是一名心智健全的基因士。既然你修不好你那坏了的心智，那我就把你绑去阿姆桑克特，亲自监督它修好。”

languages.text: « Si vous saviez comme je me contrefiche de vos histoires... Tout ce dont j'ai besoin, c'est d'un genetor dans mon entourage qui possède toutes ses facultés mentales. Et comme vous êtes bien incapable de contrôler votre propre esprit maladif, je vais vous emmener sur Amsanct de force pour que ce soit fait. »
languages.original_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous saviez comme je me contrefiche de vos histoires... Tout ce dont j'ai besoin, c'est d'un genetor dans mon entourage qui possède toutes ses facultés mentales. Et comme vous êtes bien incapable de contrôler votre propre esprit maladif, je vais vous emmener sur Amsanct de force pour que ce soit fait. »

languages.text: "Tüm bunları ne kadar umursamadığımı bir bilsen. Tek ihtiyacım, maiyetimde zihinsel melekeleri yerinde olan bir Genetör. Kusurlu zihnine sahip çıkamadığına göre seni zorla Amsanct'a götürüp bunun yapılmasını sağlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

traits.locale_text: "Tüm bunları ne kadar umursamadığımı bir bilsen. Tek ihtiyacım, maiyetimde zihinsel melekeleri yerinde olan bir Genetör. Kusurlu zihnine sahip çıkamadığına göre seni zorla Amsanct'a götürüp bunun yapılmasını sağlayacağım."

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr wüsstet, wie egal mir das alles ist. Ich brauche in meinem Gefolge einen Genetor, der im Vollbesitz seiner mentalen Kräfte ist. Und nachdem Ihr Euren eigenen kranken Verstand nicht heilen könnt, werde ich Euch gewaltsam nach Amsanct bringen und es für Euch erledigen."
languages.original_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot handle your own ailing mind, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr wüsstet, wie egal mir das alles ist. Ich brauche in meinem Gefolge einen Genetor, der im Vollbesitz seiner mentalen Kräfte ist. Und nachdem Ihr Euren eigenen kranken Verstand nicht heilen könnt, werde ich Euch gewaltsam nach Amsanct bringen und es für Euch erledigen."

languages.text: "私がこのようなことにどれほど関心がないかを知ってさえいれば。私が必要とするのは、まだ完全な精神能力を持つジェネターだけだ。そして、あなたは自分の脳を修復することができないので、私は力ずくであなたをアムサンクトに連れて行き、それを成し遂げるのを見届けるだろう"
languages.original_text: "If only you knew how little I care about all this. All I require is a Genetor in my retinue who still possesses his full mental faculties. And since you cannot repair your own brain, I will take you to Amsanct by force and see it done."
